hero.subtitle: Our own atelier in Ukraine. Bespoke jewellery made to order — from your idea, a photo, or pure inspiration.

create.title: Create your own piece
create.subtitle: Four steps from a first idea to a piece that exists nowhere else
create.step1Desc: Send us your idea or a photo reference of the piece you want.
create.step2Desc: We choose the metal (585/750) and stone — natural or lab-grown diamond.
create.step3Desc: We calculate an individual price for your exact piece.
create.step4Desc: We craft the piece at our own production and deliver it to you.

works.title: Made by our own hands
works.subtitle: A few pieces from our atelier — each born from a client's idea

can.title: What we can do
can.item1: A piece from your photo or idea
can.item2: In the style of renowned jewelry houses
can.item3: Melting your old gold into a new piece
can.item4: Natural and lab-grown diamonds with certificates

trust.title: Our own atelier. Impeccable quality. Experience.
trust.subtitle: We control every step — from the first sketch to the final setting.

reviews.title: What clients say
reviews.subtitle: Stories from those who trusted us with their dream

finalCta.title: Let's create the jewelry of your dreams
finalCta.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll calculate the price individually and get back to you.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.intro: Every piece is born from a client's idea and crafted at our own atelier. Choose the one that speaks to you — or commission your own.
catalog.empty: No pieces yet. Please check back soon.

static.shipping: Delivery across Ukraine and all of Europe. Timing and cost are agreed individually after you place a request.
static.packaging: Every piece arrives in branded Dream Gold gift packaging.
care: Keep away from children — small parts and chains can be hazardous.
Handle with care — put pieces on and take them off slowly.
Do not wear during sleep, sport, or active pursuits.
Protect from impacts and chemicals; store each piece separately in a soft pouch.

order.title: Create your own piece
order.intro: Tell us about the jewellery of your dreams — we'll calculate the price individually and get back to you on Telegram or by phone.
order.step1Hint: Describe the piece: type, style, occasion, wishes. You may add a link to a photo reference.
order.ideaPlaceholder: For example: a white-gold ring with a natural diamond, classic style, for an anniversary…
order.step2Hint: Optional — this helps us calculate more precisely.
order.step3Hint: We'll receive your request on Telegram and contact you shortly.
order.successTitle: Thank you! Your request has been sent.
order.successText: We've received your request and will contact you shortly. Have a wonderful day!
order.errorText: Something went wrong. Please try again or message us directly on Telegram.
order.privacy: By clicking “Send”, you agree that we may contact you regarding your order.

editorial.title: Light, metal, skin
editorial.subtitle: Atmospheric and on-model imagery — to show each piece in life, not only on a shelf.

craft.title: Made by hand, with soul
craft.p1: Every piece is born at our own atelier in Ukraine — from the first sketch to the final setting. We control every step.
craft.p2: Experience, precision and respect for the material — what sets handcrafted apart from mass-produced.

service.packagingNote: Every piece in a gift case
service.consultNote: We advise and price just for you

favorites.title: Wishlist
favorites.intro: The pieces you saved. Happy to discuss any — just leave a request.
favorites.emptyHint: Save pieces with the heart on a card — and they'll appear here.

process.title: How an order works
process.intro: From the first idea to the finished piece in your hands — transparent and under your control at every step.
process.step1Desc: You leave a request: a description, a photo reference, or a sketch of the piece you want.
process.step2Desc: We discuss the details, metal and stones, and propose a sketch of the future piece.
process.step3Desc: We price your exact piece — no template prices.
process.step4Desc: Once everything is agreed, you place a deposit — and we begin the work.
process.step5Desc: We craft the piece at our own atelier in Ukraine, controlling every step.
process.step6Desc: We check the setting and details, add certificates, and deliver across Ukraine and Europe.
process.ctaText: Tell us about the jewelry of your dreams — we'll get back to you.
